seo.title: Free invoice generator — no sign-up, no watermark · Snuuy Invoice
seo.description: Create professional invoices in your browser: VAT/GST support, logo, sequential numbering, PDF download. Unlimited and free forever — your data never leaves your device.
seo.ogTitle: Snuuy Invoice — free invoice generator, no sign-up
seo.ogDescription: Unlimited professional invoices with VAT/GST support, generated on your device. No account, no watermark, no paywall.

business.name: Business or your name

client.taxId: Client VAT/tax ID (optional — needed for EU B2B)

notes.paymentTerms: Payment terms — bank details, late fees… (optional)
